001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.CandlingObservationDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
006import java.time.Instant;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009import javax.inject.Inject;
010
011/**
012 * Repository implementation for candling observation data access and operations.
013 */
014public class CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl implements CandlingObservationRepository {
015
016  private final CandlingObservationDao observationDao;
017
018  /**
019   * Constructs a CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl with the specified DAO.
020   *
021   * @param observationDao the data access object for candling observation operations
022   */
023  @Inject
024  CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl(CandlingObservationDao observationDao) {
025    this.observationDao = observationDao;
026  }
027
028  @Override
029  public LiveData<List<CandlingObservation>> getByEgg(long eggId) {
030    return observationDao.selectByEgg(eggId);
031  }
032
033  @Override
034  public LiveData<CandlingObservation> get(long id) {
035    return observationDao.select(id);
036  }
037
038  @Override
039  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(CandlingObservation observation) {
040    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
041      if (observation.getId() == 0L) {
042        observation.setTimestamp(Instant.now());
043        long id = observationDao.insert(observation);
044        observation.setId(id);
045        return id;
046      } else {
047        return observation.getId();
048      }
049    });
050  }
051}
